tasks.name: JavaScript purpose & role in web development

questions.prompt: What is JavaScript primarily used for in web development?
questions.correctAnswer: Adding interactivity and dynamic behavior to web pages
answers: Defining the structure of a web page
Styling the appearance of a web page
Adding interactivity and dynamic behavior to web pages
Hosting files on a web server

questions.prompt: Which task is JavaScript BEST suited to perform on a web page?

questions.correctAnswer: Displaying an alert when a button is clicked
answers: Setting a paragraph font to Arial
Adding an image to a page
Creating a table using HTML tags
Displaying an alert when a button is clicked

questions.prompt: On many web pages, JavaScript is used to change page content without reloading. This is an example of:

questions.correctAnswer: HTML provides structure, CSS provides style, and JavaScript provides behavior
answers: HTML provides style, CSS provides behavior, and JavaScript provides structure
HTML provides behavior, CSS provides structure, and JavaScript provides style
HTML provides structure, CSS provides style, and JavaScript provides behavior
HTML provides hosting, CSS provides security, and JavaScript provides routing

questions.prompt: JavaScript is often called a scripting language because it is commonly used to:
questions.correctAnswer: Automate tasks in a host environment such as a web browser
answers: Automate tasks in a host environment such as a web browser

questions.prompt: In the browser, JavaScript is most often:

questions.correctAnswer: Executed by an interpreter at runtime
answers: Required to be written in binary
Executed by an interpreter at runtime

questions.prompt: In client-side web development, JavaScript code is usually executed by:

questions.correctAnswer: A set of instructions that runs inside another program to perform tasks
answers: A compiled application that installs device drivers
A set of instructions that runs inside another program to perform tasks
A style sheet that changes fonts and colors
A markup language for structuring content
